components-animatednumber.name: AnimatedNumber
components-animatednumber.description: AnimatedNumber component that counts from 0 to a target value using requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps animation. Features: - Smooth ease-out cubic easing - Respects prefers-reduced-motion - Re-animates on value changes - Custom formatter support - No layout shift during animation

reactDocgen.description:
AnimatedNumber component that counts from 0 to a target value
using requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps animation.

Features:
- Smooth ease-out cubic easing
- Respects prefers-reduced-motion
- Re-animates on value changes
- Custom formatter support
- No layout shift during animation

value.description: The target value to animate to

formatter.description: Optional formatter function to transform the animated value

reanimateOnChange.description: Whether to re-animate when value changes (default: true)

components-liveinvoiceticker.name: LiveInvoiceTicker
components-liveinvoiceticker.description: Live, animated invoice counter for the homepage hero (#133). - Polls `get_invoice_count` every 30s (via {@link useInvoiceCount}). - Smoothly animates the number on each update with {@link AnimatedNumber}. - Shows total funded volume (USD-equivalent) alongside the count. - Falls back to a static number if the contract query fails, rather than hiding or crashing the hero.

reactDocgen.description:
Live, animated invoice counter for the homepage hero (#133).

- Polls `get_invoice_count` every 30s (via {@link useInvoiceCount}).
- Smoothly animates the number on each update with {@link AnimatedNumber}.
- Shows total funded volume (USD-equivalent) alongside the count.
- Falls back to a static number if the contract query fails, rather than
  hiding or crashing the hero.

components-markpaidbutton.name: MarkPaidButton
components-markpaidbutton.description: Payer-only action to settle an invoice (`mark_paid`). Renders nothing unless the connected wallet is the invoice payer and the invoice is still payable — mirroring {@link CancelInvoiceButton}'s role-aware pattern.

reactDocgen.description:
Payer-only action to settle an invoice (`mark_paid`). Renders nothing unless
the connected wallet is the invoice payer and the invoice is still payable —
mirroring {@link CancelInvoiceButton}'s role-aware pattern.

components-parameterupdatebanner.name: ParameterUpdateBanner
components-parameterupdatebanner.description: Announces recent protocol parameter changes (#153). - Surfaces parameter changes enacted in the last 48h (via {@link useParameterUpdates}). - Dismissible per event; dismissals persist in localStorage so they don't reappear. - Shows at most {@link MAX_VISIBLE} banners simultaneously. - Links to the governance proposal that enacted each change. Renders nothing when there are no fresh, undismissed announcements.

reactDocgen.description:
Announces recent protocol parameter changes (#153).

- Surfaces parameter changes enacted in the last 48h (via {@link useParameterUpdates}).
- Dismissible per event; dismissals persist in localStorage so they don't reappear.
- Shows at most {@link MAX_VISIBLE} banners simultaneously.
- Links to the governance proposal that enacted each change.

Renders nothing when there are no fresh, undismissed announcements.

components-shareinvoicebutton.name: ShareInvoiceButton
components-shareinvoicebutton.description: Lets the submitter share a deep link to an invoice: copies the canonical detail URL (https://app.iln.finance/i/{id}) to the clipboard with a success toast, falls back to a visible input on clipboard failure, and uses the native share sheet on mobile when available.

reactDocgen.description:
Lets the submitter share a deep link to an invoice: copies the canonical
detail URL (https://app.iln.finance/i/{id}) to the clipboard with a success
toast, falls back to a visible input on clipboard failure, and uses the
native share sheet on mobile when available.

baseUrl.description: Overrides the default base URL (primarily for tests).

columns.description: Tailwind width classes for each cell's inner pill, e.g. ["w-8", "w-32", ...]

rowClass.description: Row height — defaults to py-5 to match real table rows

components-walletaddress.description: WalletAddress renders a Stellar G-address as a human-readable identifier when a Federation address is discoverable, falling back to a truncated G-address. Resolution is cached at the module level (see resolveFederatedAddress), so repeated renders for the same address never re-hit Horizon within a session.

reactDocgen.description:
WalletAddress renders a Stellar G-address as a human-readable identifier when
a Federation address is discoverable, falling back to a truncated G-address.

Resolution is cached at the module level (see resolveFederatedAddress), so
repeated renders for the same address never re-hit Horizon within a session.

hideCopy.description: When true, show only the resolved/truncated text without the copy icon.

className.description: Optional className applied to the outer span.

truncate.description: Override the truncation/formatting of the fallback G-address.

components-walletselectionmodal.name: WalletSelectionModal

stories.name: Wallet Connect View

components-walletselectionmodal.description: Wallet selection modal (#2): lets the user choose between Freighter and WalletConnect. Freighter connects immediately; WalletConnect shows a pairing QR when configured, or an honest "unavailable" state otherwise.

reactDocgen.description:
Wallet selection modal (#2): lets the user choose between Freighter and
WalletConnect. Freighter connects immediately; WalletConnect shows a pairing
QR when configured, or an honest "unavailable" state otherwise.

onSelectFreighter.description: Connect via the Freighter browser extension.

onSelectWalletConnect.description: Persist the user's choice and switch to WalletConnect pairing.

initialWalletConnectView.description: Open the modal directly in the WalletConnect pairing view.

components-ui-skeleton.name: Skeleton
components-ui-skeleton.description: Base skeleton primitive (#155). Renders an animated shimmer block using the shared `.skeleton-cell` style (defined in globals.css), so loading placeholders match the design system and stay consistent across the app. Compose with width/height/rounded utilities: <Skeleton className="h-4 w-32" /> <Skeleton className="h-24 w-full rounded-2xl" /> Decorative by default (`aria-hidden`) — screen readers should be told the region is loading via the surrounding container, not each shimmer block.

reactDocgen.description:
Base skeleton primitive (#155).

Renders an animated shimmer block using the shared `.skeleton-cell` style
(defined in globals.css), so loading placeholders match the design system and
stay consistent across the app. Compose with width/height/rounded utilities:

  <Skeleton className="h-4 w-32" />
  <Skeleton className="h-24 w-full rounded-2xl" />

Decorative by default (`aria-hidden`) — screen readers should be told the
region is loading via the surrounding container, not each shimmer block.

className.description: Tailwind sizing/shape utilities, e.g. "h-4 w-32" or "h-24 w-full rounded-2xl".
